# exit=0
This is makeindex, version 2.17 [TeX Live 2023] (kpathsea + Thai support).
Scanning input file main.idx....done (2 entries accepted, 0 rejected).
Sorting entries....done (2 comparisons).
Generating output file main.ind....done (9 lines written, 0 warnings).
Output written in main.ind.
Transcript written in main.ilg.
program exited (with status: 0), but keepRuntimeAlive() is set (counter=0) due to an async operation, so halting execution but not exiting the runtime or preventing further async execution (you can use emscripten_force_exit, if you want to force a true shutdown)
